steps.title: Identify the initial time
steps.content: The variable $x$ represents seconds after the acorn fell from the tree. The phrase before it fell refers to the initial moment, when falling just began. This corresponds to $x = 0$ seconds.

steps.title: Evaluate the function at x = 0
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 0$ into $f(x) = -16x^2 + 99$:
$$f(0) = -16(0)^2 + 99 = 0 + 99 = 99$$
The estimated height of the acorn before it fell from the tree is 99 feet.
